summary: Lid Angle Sync & Keep Awake for AI Agents on Mac Discussion | Link
content: Ajar makes your Mac respond to what you're doing, not what you remember to press. Lid Angle Sync maps your MacBook's lid angle to screen brightness, keyboard backlight, and system volume. Multiple displays are supported, with per-display offsets. Awake keeps the Mac awake when you're actually working. Built-in rules detect Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI sessions. Add your own for apps, Wi-Fi, disks, power, or a closed-lid clamshell.
chineseSummary: Mac 上的 AI 代理的盖子角度同步和保持唤醒讨论 |关联
chineseContent: 微开让您的 Mac 响应您正在执行的操作，而不是您记得按下的操作。盖子角度同步将 MacBook 的盖子角度映射到屏幕亮度、键盘背光和系统音量。支持多个显示器，并具有每个显示器的偏移量。当您实际工作时，“唤醒”可让 Mac 保持唤醒状态。内置规则检测 Claude Code、Codex 和 Gemini CLI 会话。添加您自己的应用程序、Wi-Fi、磁盘、电源或合盖翻盖。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
